caption: A man with a shaved head, a dark beard, and tattoos on his right arm is recorded in a studio setting against a backdrop of grey acoustic foam panels. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A professional microphone, held by a silver boom arm labeled "Neumann" and "K 87", is positioned directly in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand to emphasize his points. His hand moves from a blurred, sweeping motion across his chest toward the microphone and then shifts slightly as he continues to talk. His facial expressions remain focused and engaged, with his gaze directed slightly off-camera as he communicates. The equipment and setting remain static while the man's hand and facial movements provide the only dynamic action in the scene.
